```{r}
# Order results by adjusted p-value
resOrdered <- resLFC[order(resLFC$padj), ]
resOrdered.df <- as.data.frame(resOrdered) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("transcript_id")

# Export DE results
write.csv(resOrdered.df, file.path(workdir, "results/DE_transcripts_AMF_vs_Control.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# ------------------------------
# 4b. Variance-stabilizing transformation (for PCA, clustering)
# ------------------------------
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)

# PCA plot
pca_data <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = c("Timepoint", "Treatment", "Site"), returnData = TRUE)
percentVar <- round(100 * attr(pca_data, "percentVar"))

ggplot(pca_data, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Site, shape = Timepoint)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "PCA of Variance-Stabilized Transcript Counts",
    x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance"),
    y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")
  )

ggplot(pca_data, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Treatment, shape = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "PCA of Variance-Stabilized Transcript Counts",
    x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance"),
    y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")
  )

ggsave(file.path(workdir, "plots/deseq2/PCA_vsd.pdf"), height = 5, width = 6)


# ------------------------------
# 5. Merge DE results with functional annotation
# ------------------------------
DE_annotated <- resOrdered.df %>%
  left_join(emapper_best, by = c("transcript_id" = "query"))

# Filter DEGs: p-adj < 0.05 & |log2FC| > 1
DE_mod_df <- DE_annotated %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 1) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(log2FoldChange > 0, "Up", "Down"))

# Summary of up/down DEGs
DE_mod_df %>% dplyr::count(direction)

write.csv(DE_mod_df, paste0(workdir, "results/DE_filtered_results_",Sys.Date(), ".csv"))

# ------------------------------
# 6. Visualization
# ------------------------------

## 6a. Histogram of log2 fold changes
ggplot(resOrdered.df, aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of log2 Fold Changes", x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "Number of transcripts")

## 6b. Volcano plot
res_df_clean <- resOrdered.df %>% filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange) & !is.na(padj))
res_df_clean <- res_df_clean %>%
  mutate(sig = case_when(
    padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 2 ~ "Strong",
    padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 1 ~ "Moderate",
    padj < 0.05 ~ "Weak",
    TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
  ))

ggplot(res_df_clean, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = sig)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Strong"="red","Moderate"="orange","Weak"="yellow","Not Significant"="gray")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1,1), linetype="dashed", color="blue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-2,2), linetype="dashed", color="red") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed", color="black") +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot", x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(padj)")

## 6c. Heatmap of top 50 DEGs
norm_counts <- counts(dds, normalized = TRUE)
top_transcripts <- DE_mod_df %>% arrange(desc(abs(log2FoldChange))) %>% slice_head(n = 50) %>% pull(transcript_id)
heatmat_log <- log2(norm_counts[top_transcripts, ] + 1)

# Build column annotation
metadata_AMF_rhizo <-  as.data.frame(metadata_AMF_rhizo)
rownames(metadata_AMF_rhizo) <- metadata_AMF_rhizo$SampleID
annotation_col_df <- metadata_AMF_rhizo[colnames(heatmat_log), c("Timepoint","Treatment")]

# Build transcript labels
transcript_annotation <- DE_mod_df %>% filter(transcript_id %in% rownames(heatmat_log)) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(COG_category," (",sig,")")) %>%
  select(transcript_id,label) %>% tibble::column_to_rownames("transcript_id")
rownames(heatmat_log) <- transcript_annotation[rownames(heatmat_log), "label"]

pheatmap(
  heatmat_log,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  scale = "row",
  color = colorRampPalette(c("blue","white","red"))(50),
  main = "Top 50 DE Transcripts - Normalized Counts",
  annotation_col = annotation_col_df,
  filename = file.path(workdir, paste0("plots/deseq2/Top50_DE_Transcripts_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf")),
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = TRUE,
  fontsize_row = 6,
  fontsize_col = 8,
  border_color = NA
)

## 6d. Functional category barplots (COG)
cog_counts <- DE_mod_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(COG_category)) %>%
  group_by(COG_category, direction) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(cog_counts, aes(x = COG_category, y = n, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("Up"="red","Down"="blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1)) +
  labs(title="DE transcripts by COG category", x="COG category", y="Number of transcripts")

# ------------------------------
# 8. PERMANOVA on normalized counts
# ------------------------------
library(vegan)
set.seed(123)

vst_counts <- assay(vst(dds, blind = FALSE))
comm_matrix_vst <- t(vst_counts)

metadata <- metadata_AMF_rhizo[match(rownames(comm_matrix_vst), metadata_AMF_rhizo$SampleID), ]

dist_mat_vst <- vegdist(comm_matrix_vst, method = "euclidean")  # Use Euclidean with VST

adonis2(dist_mat_vst ~ Timepoint*Treatment*Site, data = metadata, permutations = 999, by = "terms")

# ------------------------------
# 7. Functional exploration (metatranscriptome-safe)
# ------------------------------

# A. COG category summaries (already partially done)
cog_summary <- DE_mod_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(COG_category)) %>%
  group_by(COG_category, direction) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

write.csv(cog_summary, file.path(workdir, "results/COG_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# B. Broad functional category heatmap
COG_mat <- DE_mod_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(COG_category)) %>%
  dplyr::count(COG_category, direction) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = direction, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

write.csv(COG_mat, file.path(workdir, "results/COG_heatmap_data.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# C. Transcript-level clustering using VST data
vsd_mat <- assay(vsd)
top_var <- head(order(rowVars(vsd_mat), decreasing = TRUE), 100)

pheatmap(
  vsd_mat[top_var, ],
  scale = "row",
  annotation_col = metadata_AMF_rhizo[, c("Timepoint", "Treatment", "Site")],
  main = "Top 100 Most Variable Transcripts (VST)",
  filename = file.path(workdir, "plots/deseq2/Top100_vsd_heatmap.pdf"),
  border_color = NA
)

####### Top 20
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# Convert DESeq2 results to a tibble
resLFC.df <- as.data.frame(resLFC) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("transcript_id")

# Merge with annotation
resLFC_annot <- resLFC.df %>%
  left_join(emapper_best, by = c("transcript_id" = "query"))

# Filter significant DEGs (adjusted p < 0.05)
DEGs <- resLFC_annot %>% filter(padj < 0.05)

# Top 20 Up-regulated
top20_up <- DEGs %>%
  filter(log2FoldChange > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(log2FoldChange)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  select(transcript_id, log2FoldChange, padj, COG_category, Description, KEGG_ko)

# Top 20 Down-regulated
top20_down <- DEGs %>%
  filter(log2FoldChange < 0) %>%
  arrange(log2FoldChange) %>%  # most negative first
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  select(transcript_id, log2FoldChange, padj, COG_category, Description, KEGG_ko)

# Quick summary: annotated vs unannotated
top20_up %>% mutate(annotated = ifelse(is.na(COG_category) & is.na(Description), "No", "Yes")) %>%
  count(annotated)

top20_down %>% mutate(annotated = ifelse(is.na(COG_category) & is.na(Description), "No", "Yes")) %>%
  count(annotated)

# Export if desired
write.csv(top20_up, file.path(workdir, "Top20_Up_DEGs.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(top20_down, file.path(workdir, "Top20_Down_DEGs.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r}

# Use vsd as is your variance-stabilized DESeq2 object
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)

# PCA data for plotting
pca_data <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = c("Timepoint", "Treatment", "Site"), returnData = TRUE)
percentVar <- round(100 * attr(pca_data, "percentVar"))

# Make SamplingPlot a factor with desired order
pca_data$SamplingPlot <- factor(pca_data$Site, levels = c("1_4", "5_5", "7_8")) # adjust

Fig4_C <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(PC1, PC2, color = SamplingPlot)) +
  geom_point(size = 6, alpha = 1) +
  #facet_wrap(~Timepoint) +
  geom_convexhull(aes(fill = SamplingPlot), alpha = 0.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) +
  theme_soil()

Fig4_C


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/PCA_metaT_time_samplingplot_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C, 
       width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 600)



```


### Timepoints separate:

```{r}

dds_T1 <- dds[, dds$Timepoint == "T1"]
dds_T2 <- dds[, dds$Timepoint == "T2"]
dds_T3 <- dds[, dds$Timepoint == "T3"]

vsd_T1 <- vst(dds_T1, blind = TRUE)
vsd_T2 <- vst(dds_T2, blind = TRUE)
vsd_T3 <- vst(dds_T3, blind = TRUE)

pca_T1 <- plotPCA(vsd_T1,
                  intgroup = c("Site", "Treatment"),
                  returnData = TRUE)

pca_T2 <- plotPCA(vsd_T2,
                  intgroup = c("Site", "Treatment"),
                  returnData = TRUE)

pca_T3 <- plotPCA(vsd_T3,
                  intgroup = c("Site", "Treatment"),
                  returnData = TRUE)

var_T1 <- round(100 * attr(pca_T1, "percentVar"))
var_T2 <- round(100 * attr(pca_T2, "percentVar"))
var_T3 <- round(100 * attr(pca_T3, "percentVar"))

## Plots
# Timepoint 1 = circle = 21
# Timepoint 2 = triangle = 24
# Timepoint 3 = square = 22

  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Time_month",
    breaks = c("March", "June", "July", "August"),
    values = c(21,22,23,24)
  ) 
  
  
Fig4_C_T1 <- ggplot(pca_T1, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Site, fill = Site, shape = Timepoint)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Site), size = 6, color = "black") +
  geom_convexhull(aes(fill = Site, group = Site),alpha = 0.1 ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", var_T1[1], "%")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", var_T1[2], "%")) +
  theme_soil()+
    scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Timepoint",
    breaks = c("T1", "T2", "T3"),
    values = c(22,23,24)
  ) +   theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
  )

Fig4_C_T2 <- ggplot(pca_T2, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Site, fill = Site, shape = Timepoint)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Site), size = 6, color = "black") +
  geom_convexhull(aes(fill = Site, group = Site),alpha = 0.1 ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", var_T2[1], "%")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", var_T2[2], "%")) +
  theme_soil()+
    scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Timepoint",
    breaks = c("T1", "T2", "T3"),
    values = c(22,23,24)
  ) +   theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10), #12
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12) #14
  )

Fig4_C_T3 <- ggplot(pca_T3, aes(PC1, PC2,color = Site, fill = Site, shape = Timepoint)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Site), size = 6, color = "black") +
  geom_convexhull(aes(fill = Site, group = Site),alpha = 0.1 ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", var_T3[1], "%")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", var_T3[2], "%")) +
  theme_soil()+
    scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Timepoint",
    breaks = c("T1", "T2", "T3"),
    values = c(22,23,24)
  ) +   theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
  )


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_T1_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_T1, 
       width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600)


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_T2_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_T2, 
       width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600)


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_T3_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_T3, 
       width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600)

######

ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_T1_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_T1, 
       width = 2, height = 5, dpi = 600)


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_T2_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_T2, 
       width = 2, height =5, dpi = 600)


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_T3_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_T3, 
       width = 2, height = 5, dpi = 600)

```

Combined

```{r}

# Combine with patchwork
Figure_4_C_combined <- (Fig4_C_T1 | Fig4_C_T2 | Fig4_C_T3) + plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A')


Figure_4_C_combined <- 
  (Fig4_C_T1 | Fig4_C_T2 | Fig4_C_T3) &
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )


Figure_4_C_combined


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/Manuscript_figures/Figure_4_C_combined_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Figure_4_C_combined, 
      width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 600)


```


```{r}

# Find the combined range first
xlim <- range(c(Fig4_C_T1$data$PC1, Fig4_C_T2$data$PC1, Fig4_C_T3$data$PC1))
ylim <- range(c(Fig4_C_T1$data$PC2, Fig4_C_T2$data$PC2, Fig4_C_T3$data$PC2))

# Update each plot to use same limits
Fig4_C_T1 <- Fig4_C_T1 + coord_fixed(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
Fig4_C_T2 <- Fig4_C_T2 + coord_fixed(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
Fig4_C_T3 <- Fig4_C_T3 + coord_fixed(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)


Figure_4_C_combined <- 
  (Fig4_C_T1 | Fig4_C_T2 | Fig4_C_T3) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/Manuscript_figures/Figure_4_C_combined_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Figure_4_C_combined, 
      width = 6, height = 10, dpi = 600)


```


### Locations separate


```{r}

dds_1_4 <- dds[, dds$Site == "1_4"]
dds_5_5 <- dds[, dds$Site == "5_5"]
dds_7_8 <- dds[, dds$Site == "7_8"]

vsd_1_4 <- vst(dds_1_4, blind = TRUE)
vsd_5_5 <- vst(dds_5_5, blind = TRUE)
vsd_7_8 <- vst(dds_7_8, blind = TRUE)


pca_1_4 <- plotPCA(
  vsd_1_4,
  intgroup = c("Treatment", "Timepoint"),
  returnData = TRUE
)

pca_5_5 <- plotPCA(
  vsd_5_5,
  intgroup = c("Treatment", "Timepoint"),
  returnData = TRUE
)

pca_7_8 <- plotPCA(
  vsd_7_8,
  intgroup = c("Treatment", "Timepoint"),
  returnData = TRUE
)

var_1_4 <- round(100 * attr(pca_1_4, "percentVar"))
var_5_5 <- round(100 * attr(pca_5_5, "percentVar"))
var_7_8 <- round(100 * attr(pca_7_8, "percentVar"))

#########

Fig4_C_14 <- ggplot(pca_1_4, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Treatment, shape = Timepoint)) +
  geom_point(size = 6, alpha = 1) +
  geom_convexhull(aes(fill = Treatment, group = Treatment),alpha = 0.1 ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = amf_colors) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", var_1_4[1], "%")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", var_1_4[2], "%")) +
  theme_soil()

Fig4_C_55 <- ggplot(pca_5_5, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Treatment, shape = Timepoint)) +
  geom_point(size = 6, alpha = 1) +
  geom_convexhull(aes(fill = Treatment, group = Treatment),alpha = 0.1 ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = amf_colors) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", var_5_5[1], "%")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", var_5_5[2], "%")) +
  theme_soil()

Fig4_C_78 <- ggplot(pca_7_8, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Treatment, shape = Timepoint)) +
  geom_point(size = 6, alpha = 1) +
  # coord_fixed() +
  geom_convexhull(aes(fill = Treatment, group = Treatment),alpha = 0.1 ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = amf_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = amf_colors) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", var_7_8[1], "%")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", var_7_8[2], "%")) +
  theme_soil()



ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_14_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_14, 
       width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600)


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_55_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_55, 
       width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600)


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_C_78_PCA_metaT_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_C_78, 
       width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600)

```

## Panel D


```{r}

Fig4_D <- ggplot(combined_data_DV_tr_rhizo, aes(x = Axis.1, y = Axis.2, color = Treat,  fill = Treat, shape = Timepoint)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Treat), size = 6, color = "black") +
  geom_convexhull(aes(color = Treat,fill = Treat, group = Treat), alpha = 0.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = amf_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = amf_colors) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Timepoint",
    values = c(22,23,24)
  ) +
  xlab(paste0("PCoA axis 1 (", round(pcoa_DV_tr_rhizo$values$Eigenvalues[1] / sum(pcoa_DV_tr_rhizo$values$Eigenvalues) * 100, 2), "%)")) +
  ylab(paste0("PCoA axis 2 (", round(pcoa_DV_tr_rhizo$values$Eigenvalues[2] / sum(pcoa_DV_tr_rhizo$values$Eigenvalues) * 100, 2), "%)")) +
  theme_soil()


Fig4_D

ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/pcoa/Fig4_D_pcoa_DV_rhizo_AMFtreatment_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_D,
       width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 600)

ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/pcoa/Fig4_D_pcoa_DV_rhizo_AMFtreatment_small_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_D,
       width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 600)


Fig4_D_legend <- ggplot(combined_data_DV_tr_rhizo, aes(x = Axis.1, y = Axis.2, color = Treat,  fill = Treat, shape = Treat)) +
  geom_point(size = 6, alpha = 1) +
  geom_convexhull(aes(fill = Treat), alpha = 0.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = amf_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = amf_colors) +
  xlab(paste0("PCoA axis 1 (", round(pcoa_DV_tr_rhizo$values$Eigenvalues[1] / sum(pcoa_DV_tr_rhizo$values$Eigenvalues) * 100, 2), "%)")) +
  ylab(paste0("PCoA axis 2 (", round(pcoa_DV_tr_rhizo$values$Eigenvalues[2] / sum(pcoa_DV_tr_rhizo$values$Eigenvalues) * 100, 2), "%)")) +
  theme_bw()

Fig4_D_legend

ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/pcoa/Fig4_D_legend_pcoa_DV_rhizo_AMFtreatment_small_legend", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_D_legend,
       width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 600)

```


## Panel E


```{r}

plant_data_dec23_PCO <- read_csv(paste0(workdir,"plant_data_dec23_plant_chem_only.csv"))


# Filter out T0 and select chemistry columns
plant_chem_filtered <- plant_data_dec23_PCO %>%
  filter(Timepoint != "T0") %>%
  select(`Plant N`:`Plant Na`)  # Replace with actual chemistry columns

# Z-score
plant_chem_scaled <- as.data.frame(scale(plant_chem_filtered))

# PCA
pca_plant_chem <- prcomp(plant_chem_scaled, scale. = TRUE)

# PCA scores
pca_scores_plant_chem <- as.data.frame(pca_plant_chem$x)

# Variance explained
pca_var_plant_chem<- pca_plant_chem$sdev^2
pca_var_perc_plant_chem <- round(100 * pca_var_plant_chem / sum(pca_var_plant_chem), 2)

# Add metadata for plotting
metadata_plant_chem <- plant_data_dec23_PCO %>% filter(Timepoint != "T0")
metadata_plant_chem$Timepoint <- recode(metadata_plant_chem$Timepoint,
                             "T1" = "June",
                             "T2" = "July",
                             "T3" = "August")

# Add metadata
pca_scores_plant_chem <- bind_cols(
  pca_scores_plant_chem,
  metadata_plant_chem
)


pca_scores_plant_chem$Time_month <- factor(
  pca_scores_plant_chem$Timepoint,
  levels = c("June", "July", "August")
)

pca_scores_plant_chem$Site <- case_when(
  pca_scores_plant_chem$`Plot ID` == "1-4 CMT" ~ "1_4",
  pca_scores_plant_chem$`Plot ID` == "5-5 CMT" ~ "5_5",
  pca_scores_plant_chem$`Plot ID` == "7-8 CMT" ~ "7_8",
  TRUE ~ (pca_scores_plant_chem$`Plot ID`)
)


Fig4_E <- ggplot( pca_scores_plant_chem, aes(x = PC1,y = PC2, color = Site, shape = Time_month)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Site), size = 6, color = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = plot_colors) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Timepoint",
    values = c(22,23,24)
  ) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1 (", pca_var_perc_plant_chem[1], "%)")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2 (", pca_var_perc_plant_chem[2], "%)")) +
  theme_soil()

Fig4_E


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/plants/Fig4_E_PCA_plants_time_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_E,
       width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 600)

```


```{r}
# Permanova test

library(vegan)

# Prepare the distance matrix using z-scored plant chemistry
plant_chem_dist <- vegdist(plant_chem_scaled, method = "euclidean")

# Prepare metadata for PERMANOVA
metadata_for_permanova <- plant_data_dec23_PCO %>%
  filter(Timepoint != "T0") %>%
  mutate(
    Plot = case_when(
      `Plot ID` == "1-4 CMT" ~ "1_4",
      `Plot ID` == "5-5 CMT" ~ "5_5",
      `Plot ID` == "7-8 CMT" ~ "7_8",
      TRUE ~ `Plot ID`
    )
  )

# Run PERMANOVA
permanova_plant_chem <- adonis2(
  plant_chem_dist ~ Timepoint + Treatment + Plot,
  data = metadata_for_permanova,
  permutations = 999,
  method = "euclidean",  # Already calculated, but specifying for clarity
  by = "terms"
)

# View results
print(permanova_plant_chem)

# Save results to a table
write.csv(as.data.frame(permanova_plant_chem), 
          paste0(workdir, "results/TableS10_PERMANOVA_plant_chemistry_", Sys.Date(), ".csv"))

```

## Panel F


```{r}


# ------------------------------
# 5. Merge DE results with functional annotation
# ------------------------------
DE_annotated <- resOrdered.df %>%
  left_join(emapper_best, by = c("transcript_id" = "query"))

########################################### STATS
# Total genes
n_total <- nrow(DE_annotated)

# Genes passing filter (DEGs)
DE_mod_df <- DE_annotated %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 1) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(log2FoldChange > 0, "Up", "Down"))

n_filtered <- nrow(DE_mod_df)

# Genes filtered out
n_removed <- n_total - n_filtered

# Among filtered genes, how many are annotated? 
# Assuming your annotation column is 'COG_category' or similar
n_annotated <- DE_mod_df %>% 
  filter(!is.na(COG_category) & COG_category != "-") %>% 
  nrow()

# Percent annotated
pct_annotated <- n_annotated / n_filtered * 100

# Print summary
cat("Total genes:", n_total, "\n")
cat("Genes passing filter (DEGs):", n_filtered, "\n")
cat("Genes filtered out:", n_removed, "\n")
cat("Annotated DEGs:", n_annotated, "(", round(pct_annotated, 2), "%)\n")


#########################################

# Summarize average log2FC by COG and direction

DE_mod_df <- DE_mod_df %>%
  mutate(COG_category = ifelse(COG_category == "-", NA, COG_category))

# --- COG DESCRIPTION LOOKUP ---
COG_desc_map <- c(
  # INFORMATION STORAGE AND PROCESSING
  "J" = "Translation, ribosomal structure, and biogenesis",
  "A" = "RNA processing and modification",
  "K" = "Transcription",
  "L" = "Replication, recombination, and repair",
  "B" = "Chromatin structure and dynamics",
  
  # CELLULAR PROCESSES AND SIGNALING
  "D" = "Cell cycle control, cell division, chromosome partitioning",
  "Y" = "Nuclear structure",
  "V" = "Defense mechanisms",
  "T" = "Signal transduction mechanisms",
  "M" = "Cell wall/membrane/envelope biogenesis",
  "N" = "Cell motility",
  "Z" = "Cytoskeleton",
  "W" = "Extracellular structures",
  "U" = "Intracellular trafficking, secretion, and vesicular transport",
  "O" = "Posttranslational modification, protein turnover, chaperones",
  
  # METABOLISM
  "C" = "Energy production and conversion",
  "G" = "Carbohydrate transport and metabolism",
  "E" = "Amino acid transport and metabolism",
  "F" = "Nucleotide transport and metabolism",
  "H" = "Coenzyme transport and metabolism",
  "I" = "Lipid transport and metabolism",
  "P" = "Inorganic ion transport and metabolism",
  "Q" = "Secondary metabolite biosynthesis, transport, and catabolism",
  
  # POORLY CHARACTERIZED
  "R" = "General function prediction only",
  "S" = "Function unknown",
  
  # Unannotated
  "Unannotated" = "Unannotated"
)

# 1. Combine Unannotated + "S" (Function unknown)
DE_mod_df2 <- DE_mod_df %>%
  mutate(
    COG = COG_category,
    COG = ifelse(COG %in% c("-", NA, "S"), "Function unknown", COG)
  )

# 2. Count genes per COG × direction
summary_COG <- DE_mod_df2 %>%
  group_by(COG, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_genes = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  
  # 3. Make downregulated negative
  mutate(n_genes_signed = ifelse(direction == "Down",
                                 -n_genes,
                                 n_genes))

# 4. Add descriptions
summary_COG <- summary_COG %>%
  mutate(
    COG_desc = case_when(
      COG == "Function unknown" ~ "Function unknown",
      COG %in% names(COG_desc_map) ~ COG_desc_map[COG],
      TRUE ~ "Mixed functional category"
    )
  )


direction_colors <- c(
  "Down"   = "#8C8C8C",
  "Up" = "#2F3E5C"   # deep navy
)

summary_COG_mod <- summary_COG %>%  filter(COG_desc != 'Mixed functional category' & COG_desc != 'Function unknown')

dim(summary_COG)
dim(summary_COG_mod)

Fig4_F <- ggplot(summary_COG_mod,
       aes(x = reorder(COG_desc, n_genes_signed),
           y = n_genes_signed,
           fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = direction_colors) +
  coord_flip() +
  xlab("COG Category") +
  ylab("Number of Differentially Expressed Genes") +
  theme_soil()

Fig4_F <- ggplot(summary_COG_mod,
       aes(x = reorder(n_genes_signed),
           y = n_genes_signed,
           fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = direction_colors) +
  coord_flip() +
  xlab("COG Category") +
  ylab("Number of Differentially Expressed Genes") +
  theme_soil()

Fig4_F

ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_F_DE_up_down_regulated_genes_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_F,
       width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 600)

ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_F_DE_up_down_regulated_genes_2_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_F,
       width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 600)

########### Re ordered by the numebr of downregulated genes:

cog_order <- summary_COG_mod %>%
  filter(direction == "Down") %>%
  arrange(n_genes_signed) %>%   # more down = more negative
  pull(COG_desc)

summary_COG_mod$COG_desc <- factor(
  summary_COG_mod$COG_desc,
  levels = cog_order
)

# Recode the names to shorter versions

cog_short <- c(
  "RNA processing and modification"                               = "A: RNA processing",
  "Energy production and conversion"                              = "C: Energy",
  "Cell cycle control, cell division, chromosome partitioning"    = "D: Cell cycle",
  "Amino acid transport and metabolism"                           = "E: Amino acids",
  "Nucleotide transport and metabolism"                           = "F: Nucleotides",
  "Carbohydrate transport and metabolism"                         = "G: Carbohydrates",
  "Coenzyme transport and metabolism"                             = "H: Coenzymes",
  "Lipid transport and metabolism"                                = "I: Lipids",
  "Translation, ribosomal structure, and biogenesis"              = "J: Translation",
  "Transcription"                                                 = "K: Transcription",
  "Replication, recombination, and repair"                        = "L: Replication and repair",
  "Cell wall/membrane/envelope biogenesis"                        = "M: Cell envelope",
  "Posttranslational modification, protein turnover, chaperones" = "O: Post-translation",
  "Inorganic ion transport and metabolism"                        = "P: Inorganic ions",
  "Secondary metabolite biosynthesis, transport, and catabolism" = "Q: Secondary metabolism",
  "Signal transduction mechanisms"                                = "T: Signal transduction",
  "Intracellular trafficking, secretion, and vesicular transport"= "U: Vesicular transport",
  "Defense mechanisms"                                            = "V: Defense"
)

summary_COG_mod <- summary_COG_mod %>%
  mutate(COG_short = recode(COG_desc, !!!cog_short))


Fig4_F_2 <- ggplot(summary_COG_mod,
       aes(x = COG_short,
           y = n_genes_signed,
           fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = direction_colors) +
  coord_flip() +
  xlab("COG Category") +
  ylab("Number of Differentially Expressed Genes") +
  theme_soil()

Fig4_F_2

# Labels aligned
Fig4_F_2 <- ggplot(summary_COG_mod,
       aes(x = COG_short,
           y = n_genes_signed,
           fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = direction_colors) +
  coord_flip() +
  xlab("COG Category") +
  ylab("Number of Differentially Expressed Genes") +
  theme_soil() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0)  # ← THIS LINE
  )

Fig4_F_2


ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/metaT/Fig4_F_2_DE_up_down_regulated_genes_small_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Fig4_F_2,
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)

```


```{r}

Fig4_F <- ggplot(summary_COG, aes(x = reorder(COG_desc, n_genes_signed), y = n_genes_signed, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = direction_colors) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_soil(base_size = 14)+
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)  # make the category labels smaller
  ) +
  ylab("Number of DE Genes") +
  xlab("COG Category")


```


## Figure 4 combined

```{r}
# Combine with patchwork


panel_E <- (Fig4_C_T1 | Fig4_C_T2 | Fig4_C_T3) +   # combine 3 plots horizontally
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
  theme(plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1))


bottom_row_Fig4 <- (panel_E | Fig4_F_2) + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1,1,1,3), guides = "collect") &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(2,2,2,2))


# Bottom row: C and D side by side
top_rows_Fig4 <-   (Fig4_A | Fig4_D) /
  (Fig4_B | Fig4_E) &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(2,2,2,2))

# Combine top and bottom rows
Figure_4_combined <- top_rows_Fig4 / bottom_row_Fig4 +
  #plot_layout(heights = c(1,1)) +  # same height for top & bottom
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A')

Figure_4_combined

ggsave(paste0(workdir, "plots/Manuscript_figures/Figure_4_combined_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"), 
       device = "pdf",
       plot = Figure_4_combined, 
       width = 12, height = 16, dpi = 600)



```
